title: Add Two Integers
statement: Given two integers a and b, print their sum.
notes: a and b can be negative.

title: Even or Odd
outputFormat: Print 'Even' if n is even, 'Odd' otherwise.
statement: Determine if a given number is even or odd.

title: Maximum of Three Numbers
inputFormat: Three integers a, b, c on a single line.
statement: Find the maximum of three given integers.

title: Reverse a String
inputFormat: Single line containing a string s.
statement: Given a string, reverse it and return the result.
notes: String contains only lowercase English letters.

title: Count Vowels
inputFormat: Single line containing a string s.
outputFormat: Integer representing the number of vowels.
statement: Count the number of vowels (a, e, i, o, u) in a given string.
notes: Consider only lowercase letters. Vowels are: a, e, i, o, u.
mainSolution:
s = input()
vowels = 'aeiou'
count = sum(1 for c in s if c in vowels)
print(count)

title: Factorial
statement: Calculate the factorial of a given non-negative integer.

title: Array Sum
inputFormat: First line: integer n (array size). Second line: n space-separated integers.
outputFormat: Single integer representing the sum of all elements.
statement: Given an array of integers, find the sum of all elements.

title: Find Minimum in Array
inputFormat: First line: integer n (array size). Second line: n space-separated integers.
outputFormat: Single integer representing the minimum element.
statement: Given an array of integers, find the minimum element.
notes: Array contains at least one element.
mainSolution:
n = int(input())
arr = list(map(int, input().split()))
print(min(arr))

title: Palindrome Check
inputFormat: Single line containing a string s.
statement: Determine if a given string is a palindrome (reads the same forwards and backwards).

title: FizzBuzz
outputFormat: For each number from 1 to n: print 'Fizz' if divisible by 3, 'Buzz' if divisible by 5, 'FizzBuzz' if divisible by both, otherwise print the number. Each output on a new line.
statement: Implement the classic FizzBuzz problem for numbers 1 to n.
notes: Each output should be on a new line.

title: Binary Search
inputFormat: First line: n (array size) and q (number of queries). Second line: n sorted integers. Next q lines: each contains an integer to search.
outputFormat: For each query, print the index (0-based) if found, or -1 if not found.
statement: Given a sorted array, perform binary search for q queries.
notes: Array is sorted in ascending order.

title: Sorting Problem
inputFormat: First line: integer n. Second line: n space-separated integers.
outputFormat: Print the sorted array in ascending order.
statement: Sort the given array in ascending order.

title: Two Sum
inputFormat: First line: n (array size) and target. Second line: n space-separated integers.
outputFormat: Print two 0-based indices of numbers that sum to target.
statement: Given an array of integers, find two indices that sum to a target value.
notes: There is exactly one solution. Print indices in ascending order.

title: Greatest Common Divisor
outputFormat: Print GCD of a and b.
statement: Find the greatest common divisor (GCD) of two integers.
mainSolution:
import math
a, b = map(int, input().split())
print(math.gcd(a, b))

title: Count Frequency
inputFormat: First line: n (array size). Second line: n space-separated integers. Third line: integer x to count.
outputFormat: Print the frequency of x in the array.
statement: Count how many times a given integer appears in an array.
notes: If x is not found, print 0.
